findings.detail: J1: 7-pin connector has no ground pins
findings.summary: Connector J1 has no ground pins (7 pins)
findings.description: Connector J1 has 7 signal pins but no ground pins.
findings.recommendation: Add ground pin(s) for EMI control.

findings.description: Regulator missing input or output capacitors

findings.summary: No datasheets directory found (4/7 parts have MPNs). Sync datasheets before making pin-level claims.
findings.recommendation: Run datasheet sync via the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill (which one depends on the user's distributor access and API credentials). A ./datasheets/ directory with PDFs and a manifest.json enables pin-level verification in the next analyzer run.

report_context.impact: Review claims must stay at consistency level until datasheets land.

findings.description: ESD protection audit for header connector J1: none coverage.

findings.summary: Single-pin net: __unnamed_3 only connects to C3.2 (passive)
findings.description: Net '__unnamed_3' has exactly one pin: C3.2, pin_type='passive'. Verify the intended target — if this pin should connect somewhere, the wire/label is missing.
findings.recommendation: Check the schematic at the referenced pin — add the missing wire or place a no-connect marker if the pin is intentionally floating.

report_context.impact: Likely unfinished wiring: a driven or powered pin has no counterpart.

findings.summary: IC power pin U1.3 (GND) has no DC path to a power rail (net '__unnamed_1')
findings.description: Pin U1.3 (GND) is type=power_in on net '__unnamed_1'. Graph walk (≤2 hops, rejecting capacitor edges, accepting resistors≤1Ω, inductors, ferrite beads, bridged solder jumpers) did not reach a named power rail. The pin is likely AC-coupled to ground only — the IC will not power up reliably.
findings.recommendation: Verify the schematic for this pin: the DC route must go through a conducting element (direct wire, 0Ω resistor, inductor, ferrite bead, or bridged solder jumper) — not a capacitor. If the intent was to tie VCC through an LC filter, add the missing inductor or 0Ω in series.

report_context.impact: IC supply floats DC; board will not run.

findings.summary: IC power pin U1.1 (Vin) has no DC path to a power rail (net '__unnamed_2')

Graph walk (≤2 hops, rejecting capacitor edges, accepting resistors≤1Ω, inductors, ferrite beads, bridged solder jumpers) did not reach a named power rail. The pin is likely AC-coupled to ground only — the IC will not power up reliably.
findings.recommendation: Verify the schematic for this pin: the DC route must go through a conducting element (direct wire, 0Ω resistor, inductor, ferrite bead, or bridged solder jumper) — not a capacitor. If the intent was to tie VCC through an LC filter, add the missing inductor or 0Ω in series.

report_context.impact: IC supply floats DC; board will not run.

findings.summary: Sourcing gap: 4/7 unique BOM parts have an MPN (57%). Populate before fab.
findings.description: Sourcing audit: 4 of 7 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (57.1%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

top_issues.summary: IC power pin U1.3 (GND) has no DC path to a power rail (net '__unnamed_1')
top_issues.description: Pin U1.3 (GND) is type=power_in on net '__unnamed_1'. Graph walk (≤2 hops, rejecting capacitor edges, accepting resistors≤1Ω, inductors, ferrite beads, bridged solder jumpers) did not reach a named power rail. The pin is likely AC-coupled to ground only — the IC will not power up reliably.
top_issues.recommendation: Verify the schematic for this pin: the DC route must go through a conducting element (direct wire, 0Ω resistor, inductor, ferrite bead, or bridged solder jumper) — not a capacitor. If the intent was to tie VCC through an LC filter, add the missing inductor or 0Ω in series.

report_context.impact: IC supply floats DC; board will not run.
